positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of various whimsical forest elements: illuminated mushrooms, crescent moons, delicate ferns, and smiling woodland creatures like foxes and rabbits. The style should be a modern, graphic silhouette aesthetic mixed with subtle watercolor accents, reminiscent of Art Nouveau design. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with luminous gold and cream accents. Focus on strong, clean outlines and negative space for high print contrast, creating a mystical and joyful atmosphere. Central arrangement, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Vector art quality, high detail, perfect composition.
negative: blur, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, malformed limbs, signature, watermark, text, cropped, out of frame, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyright, busy background, random lines
